properties.description: Classic 1938 Colonial on a tree-lined street in West Newton. Original hardwood floors throughout, plaster walls in good condition, functional but dated kitchen with original cabinetry. Single full bath upstairs, half bath on main. Unfinished basement with high ceilings and great potential. Detached one-car garage. Walk to West Newton Square shops and restaurants.
properties.teaser_description: Fully renovated 5BR Colonial with chef's kitchen, spa bathroom, and finished basement rec room steps from West Newton Square.
properties.full_description: This beautifully renovated Colonial delivers the best of West Newton living. The heart of the home is a stunning open-concept kitchen with custom shaker cabinetry, quartz countertops, and a Wolf range, flowing seamlessly into the dining and living areas. Upstairs, the new spa-inspired primary bathroom features heated marble floors, a frameless glass shower, and dual vanities. The finished basement adds a fifth bedroom and flexible living space with a walkout, while refinished hardwood floors and fresh millwork unify every level of this move-in-ready home.
included_features: Complete kitchen renovation with custom shaker cabinetry, quartz countertops, and Wolf appliance package
Spa-inspired primary bathroom with heated marble floors and frameless glass shower
Finished basement with fifth bedroom, full bathroom, and recreation area
Refinished original hardwood floors throughout all three levels
New high-efficiency HVAC system with central air conditioning
Updated 200-amp electrical panel and modern lighting throughout
Fresh interior paint, restored trim, and updated fixtures
Professional landscaping with new bluestone walkway
properties.sarina_notes: Strong West Newton location, walk to village. Comp analysis shows renovated colonials at $1.3-1.5M in this micro. The finished basement adds a legal fifth bedroom which is a major differentiator.
properties.zion_notes: Good bones, straightforward reno. Kitchen wall to dining is load-bearing — need steel beam, budget $8K for that. Basement has 7'6" ceilings, plenty for finishing. Overall budget: $275K.

properties.description: Charming 1948 Cape in sought-after Waban village. Two bedrooms on the main level with a third upstairs under the eaves. Original kitchen with linoleum floors and laminate counters. One full bath upstairs, powder room on main. Flat, fenced backyard perfect for expansion. Short walk to Waban T stop and Waban village shops.
properties.teaser_description: Transformed 4BR Waban Cape with open-concept main floor, new primary suite with dormer, and sun-drenched kitchen — walk to T stop.
properties.full_description: This reimagined Waban Cape feels like new construction in a village location you cannot replicate. A shed dormer expansion creates a true primary suite on the second floor with vaulted ceilings, a walk-in closet, and a tiled en-suite bathroom. The main level has been opened up with a bright, modern kitchen featuring white oak cabinetry, Carrara marble counters, and a center island. New wide-plank oak floors run throughout, and the finished lower level adds a fourth bedroom with egress window. All of this just a short walk to the Waban T stop and village shops.
included_features: Open-concept kitchen with white oak cabinetry, Carrara marble counters, and center island
New primary suite with shed dormer, vaulted ceiling, walk-in closet, and tiled en-suite bath
Finished lower level with fourth bedroom and egress window
New wide-plank white oak hardwood flooring throughout
All-new plumbing and updated electrical with modern lighting
Energy-efficient windows on second floor dormer addition
New half bath on main level with designer fixtures
Landscaped backyard with new paver patio and privacy fencing
properties.sarina_notes: Waban is one of Newton's hottest villages. Walk-to-T is a huge selling point. Expanded Capes with 4BR and primary suite are trading at $1.05-1.15M here. This will move fast.
properties.zion_notes: Dormer addition is the big-ticket item — structural + roofing + finishing runs about $65K. Rest is standard kitchen/bath reno. Clean project, no surprises expected. Budget: $195K.

properties.description: Stately 1925 Colonial with original architectural details — arched doorways, built-in bookcases, crown molding. Kitchen last updated in the 1980s. Two full baths, both with original tile. Finished third floor with bedroom potential. Large lot with mature landscaping. Walk to Newton Centre Green Line and village center.
properties.teaser_description: Luxuriously renovated 5BR Newton Center Colonial preserving 1925 character with a show-stopping kitchen, spa baths, and finished lower level.
properties.full_description: This stately Newton Center Colonial has been meticulously renovated to honor its 1925 architectural heritage while delivering every modern luxury. Original arched doorways, crown molding, and built-in bookcases have been restored to their former glory, complemented by a breathtaking new kitchen with professional-grade appliances, custom inset cabinetry, and a massive island with waterfall quartz edges. Three fully renovated bathrooms include a spa-worthy primary bath with freestanding soaking tub and rainfall shower. The finished third floor provides a fifth bedroom, and the new lower-level family room with wet bar adds flexible entertaining space. Walk to the Green Line and Newton Centre village.
included_features: Chef's kitchen with custom inset cabinetry, waterfall quartz island, and Sub-Zero/Wolf appliances
Spa primary bathroom with freestanding soaking tub, rainfall shower, and heated floors
Two additional fully renovated bathrooms with premium tile and fixtures
Restored original millwork including arched doorways, crown molding, and built-ins
Finished lower level with family room, wet bar, and half bath
Refinished original hardwood floors with custom stain throughout
New high-efficiency boiler and central air conditioning system
Professional landscaping with restored front walkway and rear stone patio
properties.sarina_notes: Premier Newton Center location, walk to Green Line and village. Renovated colonials on Ward St are rare — last comp was $1.55M for a 4BR without finished lower level. The 5BR/3.5BA configuration is a strong differentiator.
properties.zion_notes: Beautiful bones but the 1925 plumbing and electrical need full updates. Kitchen reconfiguration requires removing a plaster archway — we'll preserve the detail by replicating it in the new opening. Two bathrooms are gut jobs. Budget: $310K.

properties.description: 1962 split-level with classic mid-century bones. Open living/dining area with large picture windows. Kitchen on the mid-level with original laminate and appliances. Three bedrooms up, family room and half bath on lower level. Attached garage. Walk to Newton Highlands village and T stop.
properties.teaser_description: Stunning mid-century modern 4BR split-level with designer kitchen, new primary suite bath, and finished lower level — walk to Highlands T.
properties.full_description: This split-level has been transformed into a mid-century modern showpiece that celebrates its 1962 architecture. The new kitchen features flat-panel walnut cabinetry, white quartz counters, and matte black fixtures that perfectly complement the home's clean lines and oversized picture windows. A new primary en-suite bathroom with floor-to-ceiling tile and a curbless shower elevates the upper level, while the finished lower level adds a fourth bedroom with full egress and a stylish half bath. The open living and dining area has been enhanced with new wide-plank flooring and contemporary lighting, creating a seamless flow across all levels. Walk to Newton Highlands village and the Green Line.
included_features: Designer kitchen with walnut flat-panel cabinetry, white quartz counters, and Bosch appliance suite
New primary en-suite bathroom with floor-to-ceiling porcelain tile and curbless shower
Finished lower level with fourth bedroom, egress window, and updated half bath
New wide-plank engineered hardwood flooring throughout upper and main levels
Modern lighting package with recessed LEDs and designer fixtures
Updated HVAC system with high-efficiency heat pump
Fresh exterior paint and new front entry door with sidelights
New composite deck off the main level overlooking the backyard
properties.sarina_notes: Newton Highlands is undervalued relative to other Newton villages. Walk-to-T split-levels with 4BR are getting $1.0-1.1M when renovated. The mid-century angle gives this a unique positioning.
properties.zion_notes: Split-levels are efficient to renovate — good compartmentalization. Lower level already has concrete slab and rough plumbing for the half bath. Kitchen is straightforward, no structural walls. Budget: $200K.

properties.description: Gracious 1941 Colonial on one of Chestnut Hill's finest streets. Five bedrooms, generous room sizes throughout. Kitchen with separate breakfast room — functional but dated. Original tile bathrooms. Screened porch overlooking deep private yard. Two-car detached garage. Walk to The Street shopping center and Chestnut Hill Reservoir.
properties.teaser_description: Estate-quality 5BR Chestnut Hill Colonial with grand open kitchen, four renovated bathrooms, finished lower level, and private landscaped grounds.
properties.full_description: This gracious Chestnut Hill Colonial has been elevated to estate quality on one of the neighborhood's most coveted streets. The reimagined main level flows from a grand open kitchen — featuring custom painted cabinetry, a 10-foot island with honed marble, and a La Cornue range — through to a sun-filled breakfast room and screened porch overlooking the deep private yard. Four completely renovated bathrooms include a luxurious primary suite with double vanity, soaking tub, and steam shower. The finished lower level adds a media room, home gym space, and full bath, bringing the living area to 3,800 square feet. All of this within walking distance of The Street at Chestnut Hill and the Reservoir.
included_features: Grand kitchen with custom painted cabinetry, honed marble island, and La Cornue range
Luxurious primary bathroom with double vanity, freestanding soaking tub, and steam shower
Three additional renovated bathrooms with designer tile and premium fixtures
Finished lower level with media room, exercise area, and full bath
Refinished hardwood floors with herringbone pattern in formal rooms
New whole-house HVAC system with zoned climate control
Restored screened porch with new flooring and integrated lighting
Professional landscape design with irrigation, outdoor lighting, and stone terrace
properties.sarina_notes: Premier Chestnut Hill street — this is a trophy location. Renovated 5BR colonials here are trading at $1.85-2.1M. The 4-bath configuration and finished lower level put this at the top of the comp set. Expect strong interest from BC and Chestnut Hill Reservoir families.
properties.zion_notes: Solid 1941 construction, but scope is significant — four bathroom guts, full kitchen demo, and basement finishing. Screened porch needs new footings for the posts. Two-car garage in good shape. This is a 30-week project. Budget: $350K.

properties.description: 1895 Victorian with period details — ornate trim, bay windows, pocket doors, original fireplace mantels. Kitchen in the rear of the home with limited counter space. Two full baths with claw-foot tubs. High ceilings throughout. Walk to Newtonville village and commuter rail.
properties.teaser_description: Meticulously restored 4BR Victorian with period details, modern chef's kitchen, three luxurious bathrooms, and finished third floor — walk to commuter rail.
properties.full_description: This stunning 1895 Victorian has been restored with reverence for its period character while seamlessly integrating modern luxury. Ornate trim, bay windows, pocket doors, and original fireplace mantels have been painstakingly preserved and refinished, while the rear of the home has been opened into a dramatic chef's kitchen with marble countertops, custom cabinetry with glass uppers, and a farmhouse sink beneath a new bay window. A new third full bathroom serves the finished third floor, which provides a private home office or guest retreat. The two existing bathrooms have been completely renovated with subway tile, pedestal sinks, and period-appropriate fixtures that honor the home's heritage.
included_features: Chef's kitchen with custom cabinetry, marble countertops, and professional-grade appliance suite
Three fully renovated bathrooms with period-appropriate fixtures and premium tile
Restored original pocket doors, ornate trim, bay windows, and fireplace mantels
Finished third floor with bedroom/office space and new skylight
Refinished original wide-plank hardwood floors throughout
New energy-efficient boiler with radiator upgrades for even heating
Updated electrical with 200-amp service and period-style lighting fixtures
Restored front porch with new decking and architectural railings
properties.sarina_notes: Victorians in Newtonville are increasingly sought after. Walk to commuter rail is a huge plus for Boston commuters. Renovated 4BR Victorians are getting $1.2-1.35M. The period details are a major selling point — buyers pay a premium for authenticity.
properties.zion_notes: Victorian renos require careful work — preserving the ornate trim and pocket doors adds labor hours. The kitchen reconfiguration in the rear is straightforward. Third floor needs insulation, drywall, and electrical. Plaster repair throughout. Budget: $285K.

properties.description: Solid 1955 Ranch on a quiet Newtonville street. Single-level living with three bedrooms and one full bath. Eat-in kitchen with original cabinets. Full unfinished basement with walkout — ideal for finishing. Nice flat yard. Single attached garage.
properties.teaser_description: Completely renovated 4BR Ranch with open-concept living, modern kitchen, new primary bath, and walkout finished basement in quiet Newtonville neighborhood.
properties.full_description: This top-to-bottom renovated Ranch delivers the single-level living Newton buyers crave with all the space of a two-story home. The main floor has been opened up with a bright, modern kitchen featuring shaker cabinetry, quartz counters, a large peninsula, and stainless steel appliances flowing into the living and dining areas. A new primary en-suite bathroom with oversized tile shower and floating vanity transforms the primary bedroom. The walkout basement has been fully finished with a fourth bedroom, half bath, and flexible family room with direct access to the flat backyard — perfect for a home office, playroom, or guest suite.
included_features: Open-concept kitchen with shaker cabinetry, quartz countertops, and stainless steel appliance package
New primary en-suite bathroom with oversized tiled shower and floating double vanity
Fully finished walkout basement with fourth bedroom, half bath, and family room
New luxury vinyl plank flooring throughout basement and updated hardwoods on main level
New central air conditioning and high-efficiency furnace
Updated 200-amp electrical panel with recessed lighting throughout
New windows throughout for energy efficiency and natural light
Fresh landscaping with paver walkway and rear patio
properties.sarina_notes: Ranches are in high demand from downsizers and accessibility-focused buyers. The walkout basement with legal fourth bedroom is a game-changer. Renovated ranches in Newtonville are trading at $900K-$1.0M. Price this competitively and it will move quickly.
properties.zion_notes: Clean ranch renovation — no structural issues. Walkout basement already has good ceiling height and natural light. Need to add egress window for the bedroom. Plumbing for the basement half bath is straightforward with the walkout. Budget: $165K.

properties.description: 1930 Colonial Revival with charming curb appeal. Three bedrooms, one full bath upstairs, half bath on main. Formal living and dining rooms. Kitchen updated in the 1990s but showing its age. Enclosed side porch. Walk to Newton Centre village and Green Line.
properties.teaser_description: Beautifully updated 4BR Colonial Revival with gourmet kitchen, luxe primary bath, converted porch bedroom, and Newton Centre walkability.
properties.full_description: This charming Colonial Revival has been thoughtfully renovated to maximize every square foot of its Newton Centre location. The kitchen has been completely reimagined with a bright, open layout, custom cabinetry with brass hardware, honed quartz countertops, and a breakfast bar connecting to the dining room. The enclosed side porch has been converted into a sunny fourth bedroom, adding valuable living space. Upstairs, a new primary en-suite bathroom with marble tile, a glass-enclosed shower, and a double vanity provides the luxury that discerning buyers expect. Original character details like the formal living room fireplace and dining room wainscoting have been beautifully preserved.
included_features: Gourmet kitchen with custom cabinetry, brass hardware, honed quartz counters, and breakfast bar
New primary en-suite bathroom with marble tile, glass shower, and double vanity
Converted side porch into bright fourth bedroom with new insulation and windows
Refinished original hardwood floors and preserved wainscoting and fireplace details
Updated half bath on main level with designer wallpaper and fixtures
New energy-efficient windows throughout the home
Fresh exterior paint with restored shutters and updated front entry
Low-maintenance landscaping with seasonal plantings
properties.sarina_notes: Walk-to-Green-Line Newton Centre location is always in demand. The porch conversion to a fourth bedroom is smart — 4BR colonials command a significant premium over 3BR. Comparable renovated colonials here are $1.3-1.45M.
properties.zion_notes: The porch conversion needs proper insulation, subfloor, and window work to meet code — about $35K. Kitchen is a straightforward gut-and-rebuild. One bathroom gut upstairs for the primary suite. Overall clean project. Budget: $245K.

properties.description: Expanded 1952 Cape with four bedrooms — two on the main level, two upstairs with dormers. Two full baths, both original. Kitchen with breakfast nook overlooks the backyard. Hardwood floors under carpet. Large flat lot with stone patio. Walk to Waban T stop.
properties.teaser_description: Move-in-ready 4BR Waban Cape with bright open kitchen, three renovated bathrooms, uncovered hardwoods, and stunning backyard entertaining space.
properties.full_description: This expanded Waban Cape has been renovated with a focus on bright, livable spaces and timeless finishes. The kitchen has been opened to the breakfast nook and backyard views, featuring white shaker cabinetry, soapstone countertops, and a farmhouse apron sink. All three bathrooms — including a new third bath added to the upper level — have been finished with classic subway tile, chrome fixtures, and marble accents. The carpet has been removed to reveal and refinish the beautiful original hardwood floors throughout. Outside, the large flat lot has been transformed with a new stone patio, built-in grill station, and professional landscaping, creating an exceptional outdoor entertaining space just steps from the Waban T stop.
included_features: Open kitchen with white shaker cabinetry, soapstone countertops, and farmhouse sink
Three fully renovated bathrooms with subway tile, marble accents, and chrome fixtures
Uncovered and refinished original hardwood floors throughout both levels
New third bathroom added on upper level for dormer bedrooms
Updated electrical with modern lighting package and USB outlets
New stone patio with built-in grill station and professional landscaping
Fresh interior paint with crisp white trim throughout
New insulation in dormer walls for improved energy efficiency
properties.sarina_notes: Waban walk-to-T is always a winner. The 4BR Cape with three full baths is well-differentiated — most Capes here only have 1.5 or 2 baths. The outdoor entertaining space will photograph beautifully. Comps at $1.15-1.25M for renovated Capes.
properties.zion_notes: Adding the third bath upstairs requires running new plumbing lines — doable, there's access through the first-floor ceiling. Kitchen is a standard gut job. Two existing bath renovations are straightforward. Budget: $210K.

properties.description: Grand 1920 Colonial on a prominent Newton Center avenue. Five bedrooms, gracious room sizes. Original leaded glass windows, paneled library, butler's pantry. Kitchen with original servants' configuration — needs full reconfiguration. Two and a half baths, all original. Significant renovation potential in this prestigious location.
properties.teaser_description: Grand 5BR Newton Center Colonial with restored leaded glass, reimagined chef's kitchen with butler's pantry, four luxurious bathrooms, and paneled library.
properties.full_description: This magnificent 1920 Colonial on prestigious Commonwealth Avenue has been renovated to the highest standard while preserving its extraordinary architectural heritage. The kitchen has been completely reconfigured from its original servants' layout into a grand chef's kitchen with a 12-foot island, custom inset cabinetry, Thermador professional appliances, and an integrated butler's pantry for seamless entertaining. Original leaded glass windows have been carefully restored, the paneled library refinished, and four bathrooms have been built out with luxurious finishes including heated floors, frameless glass showers, and custom vanities. The finished lower level adds a wine cellar and recreation space, bringing this home to a commanding 4,000 square feet.
included_features: Reimagined chef's kitchen with 12-foot island, custom inset cabinetry, and Thermador professional appliances
Restored butler's pantry with wine storage and bar sink
Four luxurious bathrooms with heated floors, frameless showers, and custom vanities
Restored original leaded glass windows and refinished paneled library
Finished lower level with wine cellar and recreation room
Refinished original hardwood floors with inlaid borders in formal rooms
New high-efficiency HVAC with four-zone climate control
Updated landscaping with new stone motor court and rear terrace
properties.sarina_notes: Commonwealth Ave in Newton Center is one of the premier addresses in the city. This is a rare opportunity — grand colonials here don't come up often. Renovated 5BR homes on this stretch trade at $1.7-1.9M. The leaded glass and paneled library are irreplaceable selling points.
properties.zion_notes: The kitchen reconfiguration from servants' layout is the biggest lift — requires relocating the main plumbing stack and adding structural support. Three of the four bathrooms are gut-to-stud. Leaded glass restoration is specialized work, about $15K. Budget: $340K.

properties.description: 1936 Center-entrance Colonial in premier Chestnut Hill location. Four bedrooms, two original tile baths. Fireplaced living room, formal dining room with chair rail. Galley kitchen — the primary renovation opportunity. Screened porch, bluestone patio. Two-car garage. Near BC campus and Hammond Pond Parkway.
properties.teaser_description: Elegantly renovated 4BR Chestnut Hill Colonial with open chef's kitchen, 3.5 luxurious bathrooms, finished lower level, and screened porch on private grounds.
properties.full_description: This center-entrance Chestnut Hill Colonial has been transformed from a dated classic into a sophisticated modern home worthy of its premier location. The former galley kitchen has been blown open into a spectacular chef's kitchen with floor-to-ceiling cabinetry, a massive center island with seating, and top-of-the-line appliances — all flowing into the fireplaced living room and formal dining room with restored chair rail. A new primary en-suite and fully renovated guest bath join an added powder room and lower-level half bath for 3.5 total bathrooms. The finished lower level provides a media room and home office space. Outside, the screened porch has been refreshed and the bluestone patio expanded, creating an idyllic outdoor living area on this private, landscaped lot near Boston College.
included_features: Expansive chef's kitchen with floor-to-ceiling cabinetry, center island, and premium appliance suite
New primary en-suite bathroom with double vanity, soaking tub, and separate shower
Fully renovated guest bath and two new half baths (main level and lower level)
Finished lower level with media room and home office
Restored fireplace surround and formal dining room chair rail
Refinished hardwood floors throughout with new tile in wet areas
Refreshed screened porch with expanded bluestone patio and outdoor lighting
New roof, gutters, and exterior paint for curb appeal
properties.sarina_notes: Excellent Chestnut Hill location near BC and Hammond Pond. Renovated center-entrance colonials here are getting $1.6-1.75M. The screened porch and private lot are major selling features. Need to price carefully — this block skews slightly lower than Chestnut St.

properties.description: Classic 1945 Cape steps from Newton Highlands village. Three bedrooms, one original full bath. Small kitchen with limited storage. Unfinished walk-up attic with potential for primary suite. Full basement. Fenced yard with mature plantings.
properties.teaser_description: Charming 4BR Newton Highlands Cape with new attic primary suite, bright open kitchen, 2.5 baths, and walkable village location near Crystal Lake.
properties.full_description: This classic Cape just steps from Newton Highlands village has been completely reimagined with a focus on maximizing space and livability. The walk-up attic has been transformed into a spectacular primary suite with cathedral ceiling, skylights, a walk-in closet, and a private en-suite bathroom with dual vanities and a tiled walk-in shower. The main level features a bright, open kitchen with quartz countertops, soft-close cabinetry, and a peninsula with seating that connects to the living area. A new powder room on the main floor adds everyday convenience. The fenced yard has been freshened with new plantings and a stone patio, and Crystal Lake is just a short walk away.
included_features: New attic primary suite with cathedral ceiling, skylights, walk-in closet, and tiled en-suite bath
Open kitchen with quartz countertops, soft-close cabinetry, and peninsula seating
Fully renovated main bathroom with new tile, vanity, and fixtures
New main-level powder room for everyday convenience
Refinished hardwood floors on main level with new flooring on upper levels
New insulation and drywall throughout attic conversion
Updated electrical with modern lighting and dedicated circuits
Refreshed fenced yard with stone patio and new plantings
properties.sarina_notes: Newton Highlands is very walkable — village shops, Crystal Lake, and the T are all close. Attic primary suites in Capes are a proven formula. Renovated 4BR Capes here are trading at $950K-$1.05M. The price point hits the sweet spot for first-time Newton buyers.

properties.description: 1910 Foursquare Colonial with classic proportions. Four bedrooms, one full bath and a half bath. Original wood trim, built-in china cabinet, front porch. Kitchen with pantry — dated but spacious footprint. Close to Newtonville center and commuter rail.
properties.teaser_description: Handsome 4BR Foursquare Colonial with open chef's kitchen, three full bathrooms, restored period details, and Newtonville village walkability.
properties.full_description: This stately 1910 Foursquare Colonial has been renovated to blend its classic American character with modern function. The spacious kitchen footprint has been transformed into an open chef's kitchen with a large center island, custom cabinetry, quartz counters, and a restored original pantry with new built-in storage. Two new full bathrooms have been added — a primary en-suite with marble tile and a glass shower, and a second-floor hall bath — joining the updated main-level half bath for three total bathrooms. Original wood trim, the built-in china cabinet, and the welcoming front porch have been lovingly restored. A finished lower-level family room adds flexible living space for this walkable Newtonville location near the commuter rail.
included_features: Open chef's kitchen with center island, custom cabinetry, quartz counters, and restored pantry
New primary en-suite bathroom with marble tile and frameless glass shower
New second-floor hall bath and updated main-level half bath upgraded to full
Restored original wood trim, built-in china cabinet, and front porch
Finished lower-level family room with new flooring and lighting
Refinished original hardwood floors throughout all levels
New high-efficiency gas boiler and central air conditioning
Updated exterior with fresh paint, new gutters, and restored porch railings
properties.sarina_notes: Newtonville Foursquares have strong appeal — the proportions are generous and buyers love the front porch lifestyle. Three full baths in a 4BR colonial is a significant upgrade over the typical 1.5-bath configuration. Comps show $1.1-1.25M for renovated colonials here.

properties.description: Mid-century Ranch on an oversized Chestnut Hill lot. Open floor plan with walls of windows. Three bedrooms, two baths — one en suite. Kitchen with original wood cabinets and Formica counters. Enormous lot offers addition potential. Near Hammond Pond and Chestnut Hill Mall.
properties.teaser_description: Sleek mid-century 3BR Chestnut Hill Ranch on oversized lot with walls of windows, designer kitchen, spa bathrooms, and finished basement entertaining space.
properties.full_description: This mid-century Ranch on an oversized Chestnut Hill lot has been renovated with a design-forward approach that celebrates its 1958 architecture. The walls of windows flood every room with natural light, complemented by a stunning new kitchen with flat-panel cabinetry in warm walnut, white quartz waterfall countertops, and integrated Miele appliances. Both bathrooms have been completely renovated — the primary en-suite features a curbless shower with linear drain, floating vanity, and backlit mirror, while the hall bath gets a modern soaking tub and statement tile. The finished basement adds a flexible entertaining space with wet bar and half bath, perfect for hosting. All of this on a magnificent 12,000 square foot lot near Hammond Pond and the Chestnut Hill shopping district.
included_features: Designer kitchen with warm walnut flat-panel cabinetry, quartz waterfall counters, and Miele appliances
Spa-inspired primary en-suite with curbless shower, linear drain, and floating vanity
Renovated hall bath with modern soaking tub and statement floor tile
Finished basement with entertaining space, wet bar, and half bath
New wide-plank white oak flooring throughout the main level
Floor-to-ceiling window treatments preserving mid-century sight lines
New mini-split HVAC system for efficient zoned heating and cooling
Professional landscape design with native plantings on the oversized lot
properties.sarina_notes: The oversized lot is the star here — 12,000 sqft in Chestnut Hill is exceptional. Ranches attract downsizers and empty nesters who want single-level Chestnut Hill living. Renovated ranches are rare inventory here — comps are limited but $1.3-1.4M is realistic given the lot premium.

properties.description: 1960 Split-level in a family-friendly Newtonville neighborhood. Three bedrooms up, living room mid-level, family room and half bath on lower. Kitchen with eat-in area — original cabinets and appliances. Attached garage. Level backyard. Walk to elementary school.
properties.teaser_description: Family-perfect 4BR split-level with modern open kitchen, new primary bath, finished lower level with fourth bedroom, walk to elementary school.
properties.full_description: This family-friendly Newtonville split-level has been completely renovated for modern living while maintaining its practical multi-level layout. The mid-level kitchen has been opened up with new white shaker cabinetry, butcher block island countertop, and stainless appliances, creating a bright eat-in space that connects to the living room. Upstairs, a new primary en-suite bathroom with a tiled shower and vanity with stone countertop provides much-needed privacy. The lower level has been fully finished with a fourth bedroom, updated half bath, and a family room with new flooring and recessed lighting. The level backyard and walk-to-school location make this an ideal family home in a neighborhood full of young families.
included_features: Open kitchen with white shaker cabinetry, butcher block island, and stainless steel appliances
New primary en-suite bathroom with tiled shower and stone-top vanity
Finished lower level with fourth bedroom, updated half bath, and family room
New luxury vinyl plank flooring on lower level and refinished hardwoods above
Recessed lighting throughout with modern fixtures and dimmer switches
New energy-efficient windows on all levels
Updated attached garage with new door and storage systems
Level backyard with new fence and low-maintenance landscaping
properties.sarina_notes: Walk-to-school is a top search criterion for Newton families. Split-levels in this Newtonville pocket are affordable and popular with young families. Renovated 4BR split-levels are getting $975K-$1.05M. The fourth bedroom from the lower level finish is the value play here.

properties.description: Impressive 1890 Victorian with turret, wraparound porch, and original stained glass. Five bedrooms, two baths. Grand staircase, pocket doors, decorative fireplace mantels. Kitchen in original configuration — major renovation opportunity. Third floor suite potential. Walk to Newton Centre village.
properties.teaser_description: Showpiece 6BR Newton Center Victorian with turret, wraparound porch, restored stained glass, reimagined kitchen, and third-floor suite — walk to village.
properties.full_description: This breathtaking 1890 Victorian is Newton Center's next landmark restoration. The turret, wraparound porch, original stained glass, grand staircase, and decorative fireplace mantels have been meticulously preserved and restored, while the home has been thoroughly modernized behind its historic facade. The kitchen has been completely reimagined with a large island, custom cabinetry, soapstone countertops, and professional appliances, opening to a new informal dining area. The finished third floor provides a private sixth bedroom with en-suite bath — perfect for guests, an au pair, or a home office retreat. Three and a half bathrooms throughout feature period-inspired fixtures with modern performance. Every system has been updated while honoring the craftsmanship of a bygone era.
included_features: Reimagined kitchen with large island, custom cabinetry, soapstone countertops, and professional appliances
Restored original stained glass, turret details, pocket doors, and decorative mantels
Finished third-floor suite with sixth bedroom, en-suite bath, and built-in storage
Three additional renovated bathrooms with period-inspired fixtures and modern tile
Restored and refinished wraparound porch with new decking and railings
Refinished original wide-plank floors and restored grand staircase
All-new plumbing, electrical, and high-efficiency HVAC systems
Professional landscaping with period-appropriate plantings and new walkways

properties.description: Tidy 1950 Cape on a quiet West Newton side street. Three bedrooms, one full bath. Kitchen with laminate counters and original cabinets. Hardwood floors throughout main level. Unfinished second floor with full dormer — perfect for primary suite expansion. Full basement.
properties.teaser_description: Renovated 4BR West Newton Cape with new dormer primary suite, bright modern kitchen, 2.5 baths, and refinished hardwoods on a quiet tree-lined street.
properties.full_description: This West Newton Cape has been completely transformed with a stunning second-floor primary suite built out within the full dormer, featuring a vaulted ceiling, two closets, and a private bathroom with a tiled walk-in shower and double vanity. The main level has been refreshed with a bright, open kitchen featuring white cabinetry, quartz countertops, and a breakfast bar, plus an updated full bath with modern tile and fixtures. A new powder room on the main level adds everyday convenience. The original hardwood floors have been refinished throughout, and the full basement provides excellent storage. Situated on a quiet, tree-lined West Newton side street, this home offers easy access to West Newton Square and the commuter rail.
included_features: New second-floor primary suite with vaulted ceiling, walk-in closet, and tiled en-suite bath
Bright open kitchen with white cabinetry, quartz countertops, and breakfast bar
Updated main-level full bath with modern subway tile and chrome fixtures
New main-level powder room for convenience
Refinished original hardwood floors throughout the main level
New flooring, insulation, and drywall in second-floor suite
Updated electrical with modern lighting and new panel
Fresh exterior paint and new front entry with covered portico

properties.description: 1935 Dutch Colonial with gambrel roof and great curb appeal. Four bedrooms, two full baths. Kitchen adjacent to family room — walls could open for modern flow. Original fireplace in living room. Generous primary bedroom with dormer alcove. Two-car detached garage. Walk to West Newton Hill.
properties.teaser_description: Stunning 5BR Dutch Colonial on West Newton Hill with open kitchen-family room, three full baths, finished lower level, and iconic gambrel roofline.
properties.full_description: This iconic Dutch Colonial on coveted West Newton Hill has been renovated to match its prestigious location. The kitchen and family room walls have been removed to create a spectacular open-plan living space with a custom kitchen featuring painted cabinetry, a large quartz island, and Thermador appliances — all anchored by the original restored fireplace in the living room. A new primary en-suite bathroom with marble tile, a freestanding tub, and a glass shower transforms the generous primary bedroom with its charming dormer alcove. The finished lower level adds a fifth bedroom and a third full bathroom, while the gambrel roofline and restored exterior make this one of the most distinctive homes on the Hill. Walk to West Newton Square and the commuter rail.
included_features: Open-plan kitchen-family room with custom cabinetry, quartz island, and Thermador appliances
New primary en-suite bathroom with marble tile, freestanding tub, and glass shower
Finished lower level with fifth bedroom and third full bathroom
Restored original fireplace with new surround and mantel
Refinished hardwood floors throughout with new tile in wet areas
New high-efficiency HVAC system with central air conditioning
Restored exterior with fresh paint on distinctive gambrel roofline
Updated two-car garage with new doors and electric vehicle charging outlet

properties.description: Handsome 1928 Colonial with period charm — arched entries, built-in hutch, paneled study. Four bedrooms, two original tile baths. Kitchen with separate butler's pantry. Sunroom off dining room. Walkable to everything Newton Centre has to offer. Green Line access.
properties.teaser_description: Refined 4BR Newton Center Colonial with restored period details, reimagined kitchen with butler's pantry, 3.5 baths, sunroom, and Green Line walkability.
properties.full_description: This handsome 1928 Colonial has been refined with a designer's eye, preserving its extraordinary period details while delivering a thoroughly modern home. The arched entries, built-in hutch, and paneled study have been restored and highlighted, while the kitchen has been reimagined with a large island, custom cabinetry, marble counters, and integrated butler's pantry for entertaining. Both original tile bathrooms have been rebuilt with luxurious new finishes, and a new primary en-suite with heated floors and a rain shower has been added, along with a main-level powder room. The sunroom off the dining room has been refreshed with new windows and becomes a year-round living space. The finished lower level adds a flexible recreation area. All of this walkable to Newton Centre village and the Green Line.
included_features: Reimagined kitchen with large island, custom cabinetry, marble counters, and integrated butler's pantry
New primary en-suite bathroom with heated floors, rain shower, and marble vanity
Two additional renovated bathrooms and new main-level powder room
Restored arched entries, built-in hutch, and paneled study
Refreshed sunroom with new windows for year-round use
Finished lower level with recreation room and new flooring
Refinished hardwood floors with custom stain throughout
New exterior paint, restored front entry, and updated landscaping

properties.description: 1956 Ranch with single-level living in Newton Highlands. Three bedrooms, full bath, and half bath. Eat-in kitchen with vinyl flooring. Living room with picture window. Full walkout basement — ideal for finishing into family room. Good-sized level lot. Walk to Crystal Lake and Highlands village.
properties.teaser_description: Fully renovated 4BR Newton Highlands Ranch with open kitchen, new primary bath, finished walkout basement, walk to Crystal Lake and village.
properties.full_description: This Newton Highlands Ranch has been transformed into a bright, modern home with the bonus of a finished walkout lower level. The main floor features an open-concept kitchen with white shaker cabinetry, quartz counters, and new stainless appliances flowing into the living room with its signature picture window. The existing full bath has been gutted and rebuilt with a tiled tub-shower surround, new vanity, and modern fixtures, while the half bath gets a stylish update. The walkout basement has been fully finished with a fourth bedroom, new half bath, and a family room with direct access to the level backyard — ideal for a home office, playroom, or guest quarters. Walk to Crystal Lake for summer swimming and Newton Highlands village for coffee and dining.
included_features: Open-concept kitchen with white shaker cabinetry, quartz counters, and stainless appliances
Gutted and rebuilt full bath with tiled tub-shower, new vanity, and modern fixtures
Finished walkout basement with fourth bedroom, half bath, and family room
New luxury vinyl plank flooring in basement with refinished hardwoods on main level
New energy-efficient windows throughout for improved light and insulation
Updated electrical panel with recessed lighting and modern fixtures
Fresh exterior paint with new front door and hardware
Level backyard with new patio and walkout access from lower level

concepts.title: Modern Open Concept
concepts.description: Transform this classic West Newton Colonial into a modern family home. Open the kitchen to the dining and living areas, create a stunning primary suite, and finish the high-ceiling basement for additional living space. The result: a home that honors its 1938 character while delivering every modern amenity.

concepts.title: Kitchen & Bath Refresh
concepts.description: A targeted update focusing on the two areas that matter most: a complete kitchen renovation with custom cabinetry and premium appliances, plus a primary bathroom transformation with spa-quality finishes. High impact, contained scope.

concepts.title: Cape to Contemporary
concepts.description: Unlock this Waban Cape's full potential by opening the main level, expanding the second floor with a shed dormer for a true primary suite, and modernizing every surface. The result is a transformed home that rivals new construction in a walkable village location.

concepts.title: Classic Luxury Update
concepts.description: Honor the 1925 architectural details while bringing every system and finish into the 21st century. Custom kitchen with professional-grade appliances, spa-inspired bathrooms, restored millwork, and a finished lower level. Preserve what makes this home special — upgrade everything else.

concepts.title: Kitchen & Systems Upgrade
concepts.description: Focus the investment where it counts most: a show-stopping kitchen renovation and comprehensive mechanical updates (HVAC, electrical, plumbing). Modernize the infrastructure while creating the heart of the home.

concepts.title: Mid-Century Modern Revival
concepts.description: Embrace this split-level's mid-century DNA and transform it into a contemporary showpiece. Open the main level, add a primary en-suite, renovate the kitchen with clean-lined modern finishes, and create a finished lower level with walkout. The bones are perfect for this transformation.

concepts.title: Chestnut Hill Estate Renovation
concepts.description: Reimagine this five-bedroom Chestnut Hill Colonial as the premier family home it was meant to be. Grand open kitchen with butler's pantry, three renovated bathrooms, finished lower level, and refreshed exterior. On one of the area's best streets, this renovation creates a true estate-quality home.

concepts.title: Kitchen & Bath Package
concepts.description: A comprehensive kitchen and bathroom renovation package — all four wet rooms transformed with premium finishes. Ideal for a buyer who loves the home's layout and bones but needs updated kitchens and baths.
